facebook.caption: Some bars you drink at. Some bars you actually exhale at. Shisha Bar Phu Quoc on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the second kind. Pull up a seat, order your shisha, watch Phú Quốc slow down around you. 4.5 stars across 152 reviews. Locals and tourists both rate it. That mix is rare. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Shisha smoke drifting. Lights low. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo at night hits different. 4.5 stars, 152 reviews, and every table full by 9pm. This is what slowing down looks like in Phu Quoc.

instagram.caption: Some nights you need this more than dinner. Shisha Bar Phu Quoc. 4.5★, 152 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Lights low. Shisha lit. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo after dark. Phu Quoc at its most unhurried.

tiktok.caption: The bar that makes you forget your flight home. Shisha Bar Phu Quoc. 4.5★ #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocNightlife #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel

video_script.hook: This bar fixes a bad day.
scenes: Slow pan: glowing coals on shisha pipe
Wide shot: packed terrace, string lights
Close-up: smoke curling into night air
Cut to: drinks arriving at candlelit table
Final frame: street sign Đường Trần Hưng Đạo
